notes: Observed station analytics are rebuilt from the AADT and raw TIS sheets in the 2021 to 2024 traffic workbooks.
The workbook named TIS 2025_AADT analysis.xlsx repeats the same station AADT values found in TIS 2024_AADT analysis.xlsx, so 2024 is treated as the latest observed station year.
The 2025 network section is rebuilt from Traffic_estimate_2025.xlsx and uses annual vehicle-km instead of summing link traffic across the network, which would double-count trips.
